item.title: Rust: fear => love => hate => love => disillusion
item.description: My journey through Rusthttps://www.rust-lang.org/ was very tortuous and tormented. During this article, I want to retrace my steps towards the discovery of that amazing p…

item.title: //go:embed unleashed
item.description: One of the reasons why I love Go is that Go compiler creates static binaries by default unless you use cgohttps://golang.org/pkg/cmd/cgo/ to call C code, in which case it…
